session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of all changes:
## Summary
**PR #8642**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8642
### Files Updated (10 existing docs) 1. `docs/learned/erk/dispatch-ref-config.md` - Updated call sites from 4 to 5, added `--ref-current` docs, documented mutual exclusivity and shared resolver 2. `docs/learned/architecture/erk-statusline.md` - Added "Check Run Deduplication" section documenting the set + first-occurrence dedup algorithm 3. `docs/learned/integrations/bundled-artifacts.md` - Fixed outdated `erk/data/codex/` references to reflect unified `erk/data/claude/` path 4. `docs/learned/integrations/codex/codex-skills-system.md` - Fixed wheel install path reference 5. `docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md` - Added `list_optional_capabilities()` to key functions, documented 5 required bundled skills 6. `docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md` - Added "LlmCaller: Direct SDK Calls in Dispatch Layer" section 7. `docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md` - Added slug generation section with flow, fallback, and call sites 8. `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md` - Added case study on `launch`/`one-shot`/`workflow` reclassification 9. `docs/learned/configuration/schema-driven-config.md` - Added Pydantic version constraint note
### Files Created (2 new docs) 10. `docs/learned/cli/implement-command.md` - Implement command auto-detection strategies and execution modes 11. `docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md` - Time gateway ABC, FakeTime, and anti-patterns
### Auto-regenerated (7 files) Index and tripwire files regenerated by `erk docs sync`.
